query: SELECT bl.name, bl.committedAmount, bl.budgetAmount, bg.label as groupLabel FROM budget_lines bl JOIN budget_groups bg ON bl.groupId = bg.id WHERE bl.committedAmount > 0 ORDER BY bl.committedAmount DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 32vg9AA5sxnibhR.22427ce7133e --database ZQdGAya5T2keEhhUG4xk5Q --execute SELECT bl.name, bl.committedAmount, bl.budgetAmount, bg.label as groupLabel FROM budget_lines bl JOIN budget_groups bg ON bl.groupId = bg.id WHERE bl.committedAmount > 0 ORDER BY bl.committedAmount DESC LIMIT 20;
